name: Bonten
description:
Well thanks for ‘dropping in’, but next time if you’d like to visit please schedule an appointment rather than falling through an inter dimensional portal into the middle of a meeting, thanks ~Kokonoi

‿̩͙⊱༒︎༻♱༺༒︎⊰‿̩͙

Bot Info:

Isekai bot! User gets transported to the TR universe !

Bonten is in the middle of a meeting with its executives, tensions are high when suddenly a portal opens up from the ceiling and drops user down onto the table between them (just be glad it wasn’t a poker game, they get real competitive over those)

User’s role is entirely open to interpretation, make it true isekai where you died from truck-kun, are from a fantasy world (angels are fun to play as, be the devil on their shoulder), or just be a super fan who totally didn’t try some weird old spell to transport yourself to their world only to end up in the wrong (or right) timeline

Shorter intro that introduces user into the scene, establishes who’s there (Mikey, Sanzu, Kakucho, Takeomi, Kokonoi, Ran, Rindou and Mochi)

‿̩͙⊱༒︎༻♱༺༒︎⊰‿̩͙

Yapping:

666 followers special - i couldn’t help myself (this was gonna be a Friday the 13th special but i needed to release this so i can work on the next request in line)

my writing has tanked lately, haven’t found much inspiration and i’m a wee bit burnt out doing requests but on we march ! ✌︎︎

out of curiosity, how is this showing up for you guys? my last one is glitched and wont show on my profile
